productName: Stone City Infused Pre-Roll 2 Pack - Gelato - 1g
description: A hybrid infused joint built on Gelato and elevated with potent extract, blended in for an even burn and a noticeably bigger hit than flower alone. Boosted for extra strength and more intense effects — with notes of sweet, flowery, and pepper, with an even, best-of-both-worlds feel. A little goes a long way.
